sentences.target: Je cherche maman dans la cuisine.

translations.fr: Je cherche maman dans la cuisine.
translations.en: I'm looking for Mom in the kitchen.
translations.es: Estoy buscando a mamá en la cocina.
translations.de: Ich suche Mama in der Küche.
translations.it: Sto cercando la mamma in cucina.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a mãe na cozinha.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm mẹ trong bếp.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mama in de keuken.
translations.hi: मैं रसोई में माँ को ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter mamma på kjøkkenet.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter mamma i köket.
translations.ro: O caut pe mama în bucătărie.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter mor i køkkenet.
translations.ja: 台所でお母さんを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st sg); transitive, selecting the direct object ‘maman’.
Common noun (kinship term); here a bare NP functioning as the direct object of ‘cherche’.
Preposition introducing a locative PP that modifies the verb (place adjunct).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun ‘cuisine’.
Common noun, feminine; head of the NP ‘la cuisine’, object of the preposition ‘dans’.

translations.en: Soon, Mom is arriving at our place.
translations.es: Pronto, mamá llegará a nuestra casa.
translations.it: Tra poco, la mamma arriva a casa nostra.
translations.zh-Hans: 很快妈妈就到我们家了。
translations.yue: 好快媽媽就到我哋屋企。
translations.pt: Em breve, a mãe vai chegar à nossa casa.
translations.vi: Sắp, mẹ sẽ đến nhà mình.
translations.nl: Binnenkort komt mama bij ons thuis.
translations.hi: जल्द ही माँ हमारे घर पहुँचेंगी.
translations.el: Σύντομα η μαμά θα έρθει στο σπίτι μας.
translations.nb: Snart kommer mamma hjem til oss.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi Ibu tiba di rumah kami.
translations.sv: Snart kommer mamma hem till oss.
translations.ro: În curând, mama ajunge la noi.
translations.da: Snart kommer mor hjem til os.
translations.ja: もうすぐお母さんがうちに到着します。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb expressing imminence; clause-level modifier.
Common noun (kinship term) functioning as the subject of ‘arrive’ (bare NP).
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative (3rd sg); takes the locative/directional PP ‘chez nous’.
Preposition meaning ‘at/to the home of’; introduces the complement ‘nous’, forming a locative PP.
Stressed personal pronoun, 1st person plural; object of the preposition ‘chez’ (‘at our place’).

sentences.target: Tu peux aider maman avec les sacs.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɛde mamɑ̃ avɛk le sak/

translations.fr: Tu peux aider maman avec les sacs.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɛde mamɑ̃ avɛk le sak/
translations.en: You can help Mom with the bags.
translations.es: Puedes ayudar a mamá con las bolsas.
translations.de: Du kannst Mama mit den Taschen helfen.
translations.it: Puoi aiutare la mamma con le borse.
translations.ko: 엄마가 가방을 드는 걸 도와줄 수 있어요.
translations.ru: Ты можешь помочь маме с сумками.
translations.pt: Você pode ajudar a mãe com as sacolas.
translations.he: אתה יכול לעזור לאמא עם השקיות.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giúp mẹ với các túi đồ.
translations.nl: Je kunt mama helpen met de tassen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш допомогти мамі з сумками.
translations.hi: तुम माँ की थैलियों में हाथ बटा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βοηθήσεις τη μαμά με τις τσάντες.
translations.nb: Du kan hjelpe mamma med posene.
translations.id: Kamu bisa membantu Ibu dengan kantong belanja.
translations.sv: Du kan hjälpa mamma med påsarna.
translations.ro: Poți s-o ajuți pe mama cu pungile.
translations.da: Du kan hjælpe mor med poserne.
translations.ja: お母さんが袋を運ぶのを手伝えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb ‘peux’.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (2nd sg); selects the infinitive ‘aider’ as its complement.
Infinitive main verb functioning as the complement (xcomp) of ‘peux’; transitive, taking ‘maman’ as direct object.
Common noun (kinship term); direct object of the infinitive ‘aider’.
Preposition introducing an accompaniment/instrumental PP (‘avec les sacs’) modifying ‘aider’.
Definite article, plural; determiner of the noun ‘sacs’.
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the NP ‘les sacs’, object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Nous appelons maman tout de suite.

translations.fr: Nous appelons maman tout de suite.
translations.es: Vamos a llamar a mamá ahora mismo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们马上给妈妈打电话。
translations.pt: Vamos ligar para a mãe agora mesmo.
translations.vi: Chúng mình gọi cho mẹ ngay lập tức.
translations.hi: हम तुरंत माँ को फोन कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi ringer mamma med en gang.
translations.da: Vi ringer til mor med det samme.
translations.ja: すぐにお母さんに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of ‘appelons’.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st pl); transitive, selecting ‘maman’ as direct object.
Common noun (kinship term); direct object of ‘appelons’ (bare NP).
Adverb within the fixed expression ‘tout de suite’; contributes to the idiomatic meaning ‘immediately’.
Preposition as part of the fixed adverbial expression ‘tout de suite’.
Common noun; here within the idiom ‘tout de suite’, forming an adverbial meaning ‘immediately/right away’.

ipa: /ty pø ɛde mamɑ̃ avɛk le sak/
en: I'm looking for Mom in the kitchen.
